description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a prominent front entryway sheltered by a canopy supported by two dark columns. The facade is composed of a mix of light and dark panels, with a central double-door entrance flanked by large windows, allowing natural light into the interior. The upper level has a balcony-like parapet and two rectangular windows, while the rear and side walls are mostly solid with minimal fenestration, emphasizing privacy. The structure sits on a slightly raised platform, suggesting a concrete or stone foundation. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a neutral color palette. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a prominent front canopy, double-door entry, and minimalist facade featuring light and dark panels. Large windows and a raised platform complete its contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, canopy, and large windows.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat roof and open parapet, with minimal detail on the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two upper windows and a mostly solid wall, with the entryway visible through the interior.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the solid side wall and the extension of the front canopy.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with a flat canopy supported by columns, flanked by large windows and a raised platform.
